mechanics.excerpt: along with brief looks at few of the most Important technological breakthroughs the past millennium: humanity s fall We had little hope of stopping the downward spiral, which continued t0 accelerate RECOVERY From The Universe Today; Dr. Andrea Paliwoda _ ComStar Archives, 3058 The 3030s and 3040s were almost entirely devoted to the recovery of lostech, made possible by the discovery of the Star League memory core O Helm in 3024. With few exceptions most notably Prince Hanse Davion' war 3039 the Successor States concentrated all their efforts on unlocking the technological secrets of the past.
